queries.question: What video quality is common across all streaming services?
queries.sql: SELECT Video_Quality.quality  from Streaming_Service_Video_Quality join Video_Quality on Streaming_Service_Video_Quality.video_quality_id = Video_Quality.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Video_Quality.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Video_Quality.video_quality_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Video_Quality.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

queries.question: Show me the video quality that every streaming service offers.
queries.sql: select streaming_service.name , video_quality.quality from Streaming_Service_Video_Quality join Video_Quality on Streaming_Service_Video_Quality.video_quality_id = Video_Quality.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Video_Quality.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?quality WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_video_quality a :Streaming_Service_Video_Quality .
  ?video_quality a :Video_Quality .
  ?streaming_service_video_quality p:hasVideo_Quality ?video_quality .
  ?streaming_service a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_video_quality p:hasStreaming_Service ?streaming_service .
  ?streaming_service p:name ?name .
  ?video_quality p:quality ?quality .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the video quality that every streaming service offers.
